description: Governance structure, authority, public access, and decision-making for boards and committees

questions.title: How many seats are authorized on the board or committee, how many are currently filled, and how many vacancies exist?
questions.question: How many seats are authorized on the board or committee, how many are currently filled, and how many vacancies exist?
questions.scoreInstructions: Higher scores if the page clearly states total authorized seats, current members, and vacancies with current dates.

questions.title: Does the website clearly list member names, appointment method, term lengths, and expiration dates?
questions.question: Does the website clearly list member names, appointment method, term lengths, and expiration dates?
questions.scoreInstructions: Score higher when each member’s role, appointment basis, and term dates are easy to find and current.

questions.title: Are upcoming meeting dates, times, locations, and public notice details easy to find and clearly posted?
questions.question: Are upcoming meeting dates, times, locations, and public notice details easy to find and clearly posted?
questions.scoreInstructions: Higher scores if notices are prominent, complete, and posted far enough in advance to be useful.

questions.title: Are agendas easy to find, and are they posted before meetings in a timely and consistent way?
questions.question: Are agendas easy to find, and are they posted before meetings in a timely and consistent way?
questions.scoreInstructions: Score higher when agendas are discoverable within a few clicks and posted before the meeting date.

questions.title: Are approved minutes or meeting summaries available online, and are they posted promptly after meetings?
questions.question: Are approved minutes or meeting summaries available online, and are they posted promptly after meetings?
questions.scoreInstructions: Higher scores if minutes are complete, dated, and posted soon after approval or meeting close.

questions.title: Does the board or committee page show ongoing projects, priorities, or current work in progress?
questions.question: Does the board or committee page show ongoing projects, priorities, or current work in progress?
questions.scoreInstructions: Higher scores if the page clearly communicates active initiatives, status, and recent actions.

questions.title: Does the website list and share social media accounts, contact information?
questions.question: Does the website list and share social media accounts, contact information?
questions.scoreInstructions: Score higher when social media accounts and contact info are easy to find and up-to-date.
